tools.name: resolve
tools.description: Fuzzy-dedupe a list of records into clusters of likely-duplicate entities. Blocks by normalized token prefix, scores with Jaro-Winkler + token-set matching (exact on email/phone), unions matches above threshold, and returns a merged canonical record per cluster with a confidence score. Deterministic

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: resolve · Private data: resolve · Public sink: resolve.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: resolve · Private data: resolve · Public sink: resolve

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
